title: Guangdong City Football Invitation Poster AI
sourceTitle: Guangdong City Football Invitation Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: 9:16 invitation poster for Guangdong City Football Super League, built around a luminous soccer ball and S-curve energy flow. Subject: Guangdong City Football Super League is visualized through Canton Tower, Shenzhen Ping An Finance Center, Zhuhai Fisher Girl sculpture, Lingnan architecture, Foshan kung fu silhouettes, Zhongshan motifs, Chaoshan Yingge dancers,, woven into the flowing layout as a regional football celebration. Scene: Contemporary Guochao luxury sports-poster scene with Chinese red hero color, blue-green accents, gold highlights, complete Chinese typography, and cinematic dramatic lighting. Composition: Fixed vertical S-curve layout anchored by a luminous soccer ball, flowing energy lines, Guangdong landmarks and culture distributed along the curve, and clear invitation-poster hierarchy. Signature Elements: Preserved guangdong city football invitation poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Contemporary Guochao luxury poster design with cinematic sports energy, polished regional cultural illustration, premium event branding, dynamic flow, and high-end public-event visual finish. Color Palette: Fixed Chinese red as hero color, blue-green accent system, gold highlights, deep cinematic shadows, and luminous football energy. Lighting: Dramatic cinematic glow from the soccer ball, gold rim highlights on landmarks, atmospheric sports-event haze, and crisp typography lighting. Typography: 粤动城市 超级开赛 and 广东城市足球超级联赛邀请海报 appear in complete readable Chinese typography with premium invitation-poster hierarchy. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
